title: Future Form: Robot Store
description: Explore an editorial 3D archive of 15 humanoid robots, orbit each digital twin, and compare their capabilities.

prompt.objective: Build an interactive editorial storefront for a curated lineup of humanoid robots.

mintAssets.brief: Fifteen near-future humanoid and service robots in a coherent presentation style.

experience: Browse a carousel of robots and inspect one focused 3D digital twin at a time.
Orbit, pan, zoom, toggle motion and dither, and reset the technical showroom.
Surface concise specifications, availability, pricing context, and official links.
prompt.visualDirection: Industrial editorial archive with warm paper, bold condensed type, orange technical accents, and halftone texture.

thumbnail.alt: Editorial robot storefront featuring the orange-and-white Sunday Memo robot surrounded by technical callouts and a carousel of robot models.

social.title: Future Form: Robot Store
social.description: Explore an editorial 3D archive of 15 humanoid robots, orbit each digital twin, and compare their capabilities.

image.alt: Editorial robot storefront featuring the orange-and-white Sunday Memo robot surrounded by technical callouts and a carousel of robot models.
